replies: Hello! 👋 Ask me about any crop price — e.g. 'Wheat in Central' or 'Rice price'.

Goodbye! Come back anytime for fresh prices. 🌾

replies: I'm the Farm Price Assistant 🌾 — I give you live crop prices across markets. Try: 'Rice in South'.
